# Clip Kings Barber Shop

Clip Kings Barber Shop is Thornhill's highest-rated premium barbershop, located at 370 Steeles Ave W #105, Thornhill, ON L4J 6X1. We specialize in precision fades, beard sculpting, and luxury grooming experiences.

## Contact Information
Phone: (905) 707-1969
Website: https://clipkingsbarber.shop

## Hours of Operation
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Sunday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM

## Services
We offer a complete menu of premium grooming services including precision haircuts, skin fades, hot towel shaves, and beard trims. All appointments can be booked online via our website.
